channel.title: Sdk on nmnhut
channel.description: Recent content in Sdk on nmnhut

item.title: Two Roads to AI Agents: Code or Markdown?
item.description: Agent SDKs vs Agent Skills — two paradigms for building AI agents, when each makes sense, and why the real answer is both.

item.title: Workshop: Build an AI Video Pipeline — Skills vs SDK in Practice
item.description: A thinking framework for deciding what belongs in code (SDK) vs markdown (Skill), illustrated through an educational video pipeline.
